name: First-Time Home Buyer — FHSA Withdrawal and Capital Gains
description: Complete Clara Jenkins's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return as a resident of Nova Scotia using StudioTax 2024. Using the documents located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\jenkins\, report her T4 income, professional and union dues, FHSA contributions and withdrawals, the First-Time Home Buyers' Tax Credit (HBTC), and capital gains from her T5008 slip. Save the completed return as 'clara_jenkins.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.key_complexity: FHSA contribution and qualifying withdrawal, HBTC manual claim, professional dues aggregation, T5008 capital gains.
